openui_generate_ui.failure: Fails when upstream model call fails or returns empty text.

openui_refine_ui.failure: Fails when input schema validation or model call fails.

openui_convert_react_shadcn.success: Returns JSON with files array and optional notes.
openui_convert_react_shadcn.failure: Fails on invalid JSON, schema mismatch, or unsafe output path.

openui_make_react_page.success: Returns JSON payload with html, files, notes, and detection metadata.
openui_make_react_page.failure: Fails if generate/convert stage fails or output validation fails.

openui_apply_files.success: Returns apply plan/written summary and supports rollback details.
openui_apply_files.failure: Fails on path traversal, write errors, or rollback failure.

openui_embed_content.success: Returns embedding vectors and provider metadata.
openui_embed_content.failure: Fails when embedding provider rejects request or returns invalid shape.

openui_rag_upsert.success: Returns inserted document count and index metadata.
openui_rag_upsert.failure: Fails on invalid document schema or embedding/index errors.

openui_rag_search.failure: Fails on retrieval pipeline errors or invalid search payload.

openui_observe_screen.success: Returns observation output from computer-use model path.
openui_observe_screen.failure: Fails when multimodal payload is invalid or provider call fails.

openui_execute_ui_action.success: Returns action execution result and risk metadata.
openui_execute_ui_action.failure: Fails when high-risk action misses confirmation or action schema is invalid.

openui_computer_use_loop.success: Returns observe-plan-act loop result with safety decisions.
openui_computer_use_loop.failure: Fails on invalid planned action contract or provider-side execution error.

openui_review_uiux.success: Returns structured UI/UX heuristic review payload.
openui_review_uiux.failure: Fails on schema validation errors or model scoring errors.

openui_quality_gate.failure: Fails in strict mode when command policy or validation checks fail.

openui_next_smoke.failure: Fails when Next.js install/build/start/probe stages fail.

openui_ship_react_page.success: Returns end-to-end payload with steps and summary status.
openui_ship_react_page.failure: Fails when any required stage (generate/convert/apply/quality_gate) fails.

openui_detect_shadcn_paths.failure: Fails when workspace path is invalid or detection inputs are unreadable.

openui_list_models.failure: Fails when Gemini sidecar list_models call fails.

advanced.name: Multimodal computer-use
advanced.expected: Risky actions require confirmation and keep action contract
